game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Bloons TD 6 Bloons TD 6 is a tower defense game where players strategically place and upgrade monkey towers along a path to pop waves of incoming "Bloons" (balloons) before they reach the end. The game features diverse Bloon types requiring specific tower abilities, an in-game cash economy for tower purchases and upgrades, and a "Monkey Knowledge" meta-progression system providing permanent buffs.
game_info.description: "Primate Patrol" is a strategic tower defense game where you must stop waves of colorful balloons from traversing the map. You control a placement cursor to build defensive Monkey Towers along the path. Earn money by popping balloons to buy more towers or upgrade existing ones. Different balloons have different speeds and toughness, requiring a mix of fast-firing and long-range defenses. Survive all waves to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move the construction cursor across the map.
- Z: Cycle through available tower types to build.
- Space: Build the selected tower at cursor position (if valid) OR Select/Deselect an existing tower.
- Shift: Upgrade the currently selected tower (if enough money).
- Enter: Start the next wave (only when no wave is active) / Start Game.
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game (only on Game Over screens).

TEST_1.test_description: Verify tower placement and wave clearing capability.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will move the cursor to a strategic position near the start of the path, place a Dart Monkey, start the wave, and then upgrade the tower when money allows.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive the first wave without losing all lives, and the tower count should be at least 1.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test input handling and boundary conditions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will generate random valid inputs (movement, placement, switching towers) rapidly to ensure the game remains stable and doesn't crash under chaotic input.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game continues running for a set duration without errors, regardless of the game state (win/lose).
